desc.ur: Do variables x = 1 aur y = 2 ko arithmetic operations (+ aur -) ke zariye third variable ke baghair swap karo.
desc.en: Swap two variables x = 1 and y = 2 using arithmetic operations (+ and -) without using a third variable.

hint.ur: x = x + y formula se start karo.
hint.en: Start with the formula x = x + y.

solution:
x = 1
y = 2
x = x + y
y = x - y
x = x - y
print(f"x={x}, y={y}")

desc.ur: Loops ke zariye number 1 ka factorial find karo.
desc.en: Calculate the factorial of number 1 using loops.

hint.ur: Factorial ke liye values ko multiply karte jao.
hint.en: Multiply the values progressively for factorial.

solution:
n = 1
fact = 1
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    fact *= i
print(fact)

desc.ur: List [10, 20, 30, 10] mein linear search target 10 index find karo loop se.
desc.en: Perform linear search on the list [10, 20, 30, 10] to find the index of target 10 using loops.

hint.ur: Loop target value key comparison check index counter.
hint.en: Loop through list checking value matching to target index.

solution:
lst = [10, 20, 30, 10]
target = 10
found_idx = -1
for idx, val in enumerate(lst):
    if val == target:
        found_idx = idx
        break
print("Index:", found_idx)

desc.ur: List [1, 2, 3, 1] ko loops ka use karke manually reverse karo (bina s[::-1] ya .reverse() ke).
desc.en: Manually reverse the list [1, 2, 3, 1] using loops (without s[::-1] or .reverse()).

hint.ur: Empty list bana kar original elements ko piche se append karo.
hint.en: Create a new list and append elements from the back of the original list.

solution:
lst = [1, 2, 3, 1]
rev = []
for item in lst[::-1]:
    rev.append(item)
print(rev)

lst = [1, 2, 3, 5]
rev = []
for item in lst[::-1]:
    rev.append(item)
print(rev)
